---
title: "outlier_sim"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(broom)

outlier_rcbd <- function(blocks, treatments, beta_b, sigma_e, sigma_G, pi) {
  
  data <- expand.grid(
    block = factor(1:blocks),
    treatment = factor(1:treatments)
  )
  
  alpha_t <- rep(0, treatments)
  
  G <- rnorm(pi * rnorm(data), 0, sigma_G * sigma_e)
  
  e <- rnorm((1-pi) * nrow(data), 0, sigma_e) + G
  
  data$response <- alpha_t[data$treatment] + beta_b[data$block] + e
  
  model <- aov(response ~ treatment + block, data)
  
  p_value <- anova(model) |>
    tidy() |>
    filter(term == "treatment") |>
    pull(p.value)
  
  return (p_value < 0.05)
}
```

```{r}
set.seed(100)

beta_b <- c(-5, -3, -1, 0, 1, 3, 5)

pi_grid <- seq(0, 0.3, by = 0.05)

outlier_pi_curve <- tibble(pi_vals = pi_grid) |>
  mutate(t1er = map_dbl(pi_vals, function(pi) {
    map_lgl(1:1000,~ outlier_rcbd(7, 8, beta_b, 1, 100, pi)) |>
        mean()
      }))
```
